titleStmt.title: SII 9.332: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 332. (A.R. No. 269 of 1918.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN THE KUMARASVAMI TEMPLE AT MUTTIGI, SAME TALUK AND DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1136, Bhāva, Vaiśākha, śu. 1, Sōmavāra. In Bhāva, Vaiśākha śu. 1 corresponded to A.D. 1214 April 12 Saturday (not Monday). In the previous year, however, it began on Monday = 22nd April 1213 at ·44. The record belongs to the reign of the Hoysaḷa king Vīra-Ballaladeva (II). It registers a gift of land for the maintenance of a water-shed at Muttage, the chief place of Muttage thirty, a sub-division of Kōgaḷi five-hundred, by the Brāhman Hariyaṇṇa or Harihara, son of Vishṇu-Nāyaka, the Ūroḍeya of Ammeḷe and the Heggaḍe of Raṅgayya, after receiving it from Boppaya-Bammaya, the Prabhu of the village.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Ōṁ . namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanaga
rāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti śrījayaścābhyu
dayaśca . sakavarṣa 1136 neya bhāvasaṁvatsarada vaiśākha suddha
1 sōmavāradaṁdu . kaṁda . vīrada balpiṁ negaḷdī dhāriṇiyo
jade tāḷida vijayaśrīramaṇanamaḷakīrtyādhāraṁ ballāḷadēvane
sadaṁ dhareyoḷū . Arinriparaṁ beṁkoḷvaṁ birudara gaṁ
ḍalevana mārkoḷvaṁ dhuradoḷidiri saṁharisuva kali ne
gaḷdanalte ballāḷanripaṁ . svasti samastapraśastisahitaṁ yādavakuḷāṁ
baradyumaṇi sa(ṁ)myaktacūḍāmaṇi malerājarāja malaparoḷu gaṁ
ḍa śanivārasiddhi giridurggamalla . nasahāyaśūranēkāṁgavīra nissaṁ
kapratāpacakravartti hoysaḷa vīraballāḷadēvaru guṁḍiya nelevīḍino
ḷu sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamira . kaṁda . vodavida
kuṁtaḷadēśakkidu kaṁnaḍi pāṁḍyaviṣayaṁ sogayippu
du nāḍe celuviniṁ samasta saṁcayadinettaṁ . ka . Aṁ
teseva pāṁḍyaviṣayakkiṁtidu ramaṇīmukuramāgi kōgaḷiyaynū
®saṁtara basaṁta nisi sogayisi tōrkkū . va .
Aṁteseva kōgaḷiyaynūṟaḻoḷage muttage mūvattakkaṁ śirōmaṇiye
nipa muttageya prabhugaḷa guṇastutiyeṁtene kaṁda . vibhavadoḷū
rjjitatējaprabhavadoḷāśrita rakṣisuvā prabhuteyo
ḷu dānaguṇadoḷu prabhu bommayyaṁge samanenippavanāvaṁ . kaṁ .
permmege vinūtakīrttige nirmmaḷa nēḷgegaudārakkaṁ nūrmmaḍi
yenipa mahāprabhu bhūmmayyaṁga vasudhātaḷadoḷū . vaca .
Aṁtavarssukhadinire pratāpacakravartti hoysaḷa vīraballāḷadēvara śrīpādapa
dmōpajīvi mahāpasāyitaṁ leṁka dadhiṣṭāyakanappa sāvāsi raṁgayya
na herggaḍeyanṁmeḷeye vūraḍeya viṣu nāyakara hariyaṇnanātana guṇastu
tiyeṁtene . ka . nutaviprānvayatiḷakaṁ patihitanatiśayavinūtadharmmaparaṁ sa(ṁ)
nnutamaṁtri hariharāṁkaṁ kṣitiyoḷu sale negaḷdaneṁdaḍē vaṇnipudō .
A(ṁ)ntu negaḷda hariyaṇnanu muttageya heggaḍetanaṁ māḍuvalliyalliya pra
bhu boppayyabammayyana keyyalu dhārāpūrvvakavāgi bhūmiyanu haḍa
du Aṟavaṇṭageya vudakadānakkaṁ nikki dharmmavācaṁdrārkkatā
raṁbaraṁ saluvaṁtāgiyamāseyādityavāra vyatīpāta saṁkramā
ṇa sūryyagrahaṇadalu biṭṭa ḷḷiyadāriyiṁ teṁkalu mū
ḍaṇa mēreyereyabāgu teṁkaṇamēre paḷḷapaḍuvaṇa mēre doḍḍabadu
hu baḍagaṇamēre yīśāṁnya yiṁtu caturasra kōga
ḷiya gaḍiṁbadalu mattaru 1 © ka . manamosedu hariharāṁkaṁ vinu
tayaśōmūrttiyudakadānakkittaṁ janavinutamāge bhūmiyanenasuṁ
caṁdrārkkatāramuḷḷannevaraṁ . yiṁtī dharmmavaṁ pratipāḷisidavaru vā
raṇāsiyalu sahasradhēnuvanu sabhrāhmaṇarigeyalaṁkārasahita ko
ṭṭa phala yī dharmmamanapaharisidavaru gaṁgeya taḍiyalu gōvu brāhmara
nu svahastadalu vadhisida pāpa . ślō . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁ
dharāṁ ṣaṣṭhirvvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . maṁgaḷa mahāśrī .
Digital edition of SII 9.332 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
